⚖

Select players to compare

Choose a batter (or bowler) and up to 10 opponents to see their record in shared matches.

* Stats are for matches where both players appeared on opposing sides. "Times Dismissed" = innings where the specific bowler is credited with the dismissal (b, lbw, c, cw, st, etc.).

🏏

Select players to compare

Search from 3,253 Test cricketers. Select one player to view their stats, or compare up to 10 — or pick a Duo, Triple, Quartet, Quintet or Eleven from Record Type above.

🤝

Select partnerships to compare

Choose two players for each partnership to compare their batting partnership statistics when they played together.

Cricket Times is free and independent. If you find value in our stories, analyses and tools, consider buying me a coffee to keep the scoreboard ticking.
